## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change
- [ ] New term(s) / modified term(s)
- [ ] Bug fix (labels, annotations, axioms)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tooling / CI

## Checklist
- [ ] All TTL files parse (CI validation is green)
- [ ] `bump-version --check` passes (no version drift)
- [ ] No IRIs were changed or removed (deprecate, never delete; IRI changes require maintainer approval)
- [ ] New/changed terms carry `skos:prefLabel` and an EMMO elucidation
- [ ] The declared SemVer impact matches the change (see CONTRIBUTING)
